privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for socioboard_env configure_notification_smtp task by confirming that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the configuration of an SMTP email service for Socioboard. Verified that the expected config path ('/opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/notification/config/development.json'), report path ('/home/ga/notification_smtp_report.txt'), host ('smtp.brightwave-agency.com'), port (587), and user credentials ('notifications@brightwave-agency.com', 'BrightNotify2024!') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
